<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused on one logical change. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md` / `SKILL.md`) when user-facing
- [ ] No secrets committed (no `.env`, no PAT)
